♠ **物件特色** ♠

**☄****屋主誠意出售****(欲購從速**) **☄****您喜歡我努力**

注意事項:

△此頁面所登載房屋物件資料倘若與實際情形有所差異時，仍以地政機關登記資料與現場專人解說為準。△本頁面所刊登照片若與標的現場屋況照片不盡相同時，單純是以房屋標的附近街景環境照片提供作參考示意用。△本頁面若有格局圖，僅供參考，仍以現場看屋及參閱地政機關之建物測量成果圖為準。△本頁面所標示物件屋齡資料倘若在調閱地政機關資料及建物權狀登記都並無標示建築完成日時，為配591公司系統刊登售屋廣告必須KEY IN屋齡不然無法刊登的規定，是故才以地政機關電子謄本登記房屋第一次登記日期或建物成果圖登載日期資料所粗估概算，所以有誤差，並非切確實際屋齡，特在此明確鄭重告知。

1、房屋照片僅反應使用現況，用途以使用執照或謄本記載為準。刊登內容的法定用途與現況使用不同時，恐涉違反建管法規，有遭勒令拆 除、改建、停止使用或恢復原狀之風險，請消費者於購屋或承租前多加了解相關規定，以保障自身權益。  
  
2、本公司所使用之所有內容，任何人不得擅自使用非經授權之智慧財產權內容，亦不得使用網路爬蟲或其他自動下載程式或任何其他類似或具相同功能的手動程序來連續自動搜索、獲得、使用、下載，如有違反，除依相關法律規定論處，並應對591負損害賠償責任，本公司將收取一個刊登物件內容，三千元計算之費用，您與本公司簽署正式合作合約前，應立即停止非經合法授權之行為。  
  
  
3、依臺北市土地使用分區管制規則，本建物不可作住宅使用，請您於購屋或承租前瞭解清晰本建物合法用途，以保障自身消費權益。您可至「[臺北市土地使用分區申請及查詢系統](//www.zone.gov.taipei/)」查詢土地使用説明。

data.simple\_address }} </div> </div> <div class="ad-recommend" v-if="origin !== 'list' && data.tag.length"> <div class="left-info"> <span class="tag" v-for="(tag, index) in data.tag">{{ tag 1">起</span></span> <span v-if="type==='rent'">元/月<span v-if="data.online\_num > 1">起</span></span> </div> <!-- 僅在列表展示 --> <div class="extra" v-if="origin === 'list' && data.label"> <span>{{ data.label class="login-dialog-content"> <div class="login-dialog-body"> <iframe :src="iframeUrl" frameborder="0" @load="onIframeLoaded"></iframe> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="quality-team-container"> 'https://hp2.591.com.tw/user/photo/default-shop.jpg'" /> <i class="icon-play" v-if="teamData.videoCover"></i> </div> <div class="shop-info"> <div class="shop-name-row" :class="{'clickable': teamData.old\_shop\_id}" @click="navtoShop"> <span class="shop-tag">{{ teamData.high\_quality\_tag || '績優門市' }}</span> <span class="shop-name">{{ teamData.company\_name }}-{{ members-scroll-left" @click="scrollLeft" > <i class="icon-arrow-left"></i> </div> <div class="members-container" ref="membersContainer" @scroll="handleMembersScroll" > <div class="members-list"> <div v-for="(member, index) in members" :key="member.id" class="member-card" @mouseenter="handleCardMouseEnter(index, $event)" @mouseleave="handleCardMouseLeave($event)" > <div class="member-card-default" > <div class="member-avatar"> <img :src="member.avatar" :alt="truncate(member.username)" /> </div> <div class="member-info"> <div class="member-name-row"> <span class="member-name">{{ truncate(member.username + '·' + member.job\_title, !member.honor.length ? 7 : 5) }}</span> <i class="icon-id-card"></i> <i class="icon-gold-cup" v-if="member.honor.length"></i> </div> </div> <div class="member-buttons"> <div class="member-consult-btn" @mouseenter="handleConsultMouseEnter(index, $event)" @mouseleave="handleConsultMouseLeave($event)" > 諮詢物件 </div> <teleport to="body" v-if="hoveredConsultIndex === index"> <div class="v-consult-tooltip" :style="popoverStyle" @mouseenter="handlePopoverMouseEnter" @mouseleave="handlePopoverMouseLeave"> <div class="tooltip-phone" @click="handleMemberPhoneClick(member)" > <i class="icon-phone"></i> <span class="phone-number">{{ member.mobile }}</span> <i class="icon-qrcode" @mouseenter="handleTeamQrMouseEnter(index, member)" @mouseleave="handleTeamQrMouseLeave"> <div class="v-phone-qrcode" v-show="showPhoneQrCode && qrMemberIndex === index"> <div :id="\`v-team-phone-qrcode-${index}\`" class="qrcode-container"></div> <div class="icon-line"></i> <span>加好友</span> </div> <div class="tooltip-item" @click="handleMemberImClick(member)" > <i class="icon-chat"></i> <span>房聊</span> </div> </div> </div> </teleport> <div class="member-callback-btn" @click="handleMemberCallbackClick(member)" @mouseenter="handleCallbackMouseEnter" @mouseleave="handleCallbackMouseLeave(index, $event)" > 回電 </div> </div> </div> <div class="member-card-achievements" v-if="member.honor.length" > <div class="achievements-content"> <div class="achievement-deal" v-if="member.deal\_info.deal\_count"> <i class="icon-gold-cup"></i> <span class="deal-text-wrapper" @mouseenter="handleDealTextMouseEnter($event, member)" @mouseleave="handleDealTextMouseLeave"> <span class="deal-text">{{ member.deal\_info.deal\_year }}年成交{{ member.deal\_info.deal\_count }}筆</span> </span> </div> <div class="deal-tooltip" v-show="dealTooltipVisible" :style="dealTooltipStyle">{{ dealTooltipText }}</div> <div class="achievement-honors"> <div v-for="(item, hIndex) in member.honor" :key="hIndex" class="honor-item" :class="{'with-icon': !member.deal\_info.deal\_count && member.honor.length === 1}" > <i class="icon-gold-cup" v-if="!member.deal\_info.deal\_count && member.honor.length === 1"></i> {{ formatHonor(item) }} </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div v-if="canScrollRight" class="members-scroll-btn members-scroll-right" @click="scrollRight" > <i class="icon-arrow-right"></i> </div> </div> <div v-if="isDisplayStatistics" class="quality-team-statistics"> <div class="shop-contact-buttons" :class="{'no-line':!linkInfo.line}"> <div class="shop-phone-btn" @mouseenter="handleShopPhoneMouseEnter" @mouseleave="handleShopPhoneMouseLeave"> <div class="phone-content" :class="{'long-phone': isLongPhone}"> <span class="phone-text">洽詢</span> <span class="phone-number">{{ linkInfo.preferred\_contact\_method === 'phone' ? (linkInfo.tel || linkInfo.mobile) : linkInfo.mobile }}</span> </div> <i class="icon-qrcode"></i> <div class="shop-qrcode" v-show="shopQrCodeVisible"> <div class="qrcode-image" id="shop-qrcode-container"></div> <div class="qrcode-text">掃碼撥打電話</div> </div> </div> <div class="shop-action-buttons"> <div class="shop-im-btn im-box onlineConsultEntrance" data-behavior-im="詳情頁-店鋪實力" data-entrance="PC-中古屋詳情頁-優質團隊-店鋪實力-房聊-K" > <i class="icon-chat"></i> <span>房聊</span> </div> <div class="shop-line-btn" @click="handleShopLineClick" v-if="linkInfo.line"> <i class="icon-line"></i> <span>加好友</span> </div> <div v-if="!linkInfo.line" class="shop-callback-btn" @click="handleShopCallbackClick"> <i class="icon-edit"></i> <span>邀請回電</span> </div> </div> </div> <div class="shop-statistics-data"> <div class="statistics-row"> <div class="statistics-item"> <div class="statistics-value">{{ statistics.dealCount }}<span class="unit">筆</span></div> <div class="statistics-label">{{ statistics.dealYear }}成交筆數</div> </div> <div class="statistics-item statistics-item-link"> <div class="statistics-value">{{ statistics.teamSize }}<span class="unit">人</span></div> <div class="statistics-label">團隊人數</div> </div> <div class="statistics-item statistics-item-link"> <div class="statistics-value">{{ statistics.onSaleCount }}<span class="unit">筆</span></div> <div class="statistics-label">在售物件</div> </div> <div class="statistics-item statistics-item-link"> <div class="statistics-value">{{ statistics.onRentCount }}<span class="unit">筆</span></div> <div class="statistics-label">在租物件</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <shop-gallery :visible="showShopGallery" :album="teamData.album" :video="teamData.video" @close="closeShopGallery" /> </div> <teleport to="body" v-if="visible"> <div class="shop-gallery-overlay" @click.self="close"> <div class="shop-gallery-container"> <div class="shop-gallery-close" @click="close"></div> <div class="shop-gallery-main"> <div class="shop-gallery-arrow shop-gallery-arrow-left" :class="{ disabled: isFirstItem }" @click="prev" > <i class="icon-arrow-left"></i> </div> <div class="shop-gallery-viewer"> <template v-if="currentItem"> <template v-if="currentItem.type === 'video'"> <div class="shop-gallery-video" v-if="isVideoPlaying"> <iframe :src="videoPlayerUrl" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen ></iframe> </div> <div class="shop-gallery-video-cover" v-else @click="playVideo"> <img :src="currentItem.cover" alt="視頻封面" /> <div class="play-btn"> <i class="icon-play-large"></i> </div> </div> </template> <template v-else> <img :src="currentItem.url" alt="店鋪圖片" class="shop-gallery-image" /> </template> </template> </div> <div class="shop-gallery-arrow shop-gallery-arrow-right" :class="{ disabled: isLastItem }" @click="next" > <i class="icon-arrow-right"></i> </div> </div> <div class="shop-gallery-footer"> <div class="shop-gallery-counter"> <span class="current">{{ displayIndex }}</span> <span class="separator">/</span> <span class="total">{{ totalCount }}</span> </div> </div> <div class="shop-gallery-thumbs"> <div class="shop-gallery-thumbs-list" ref="thumbList"> <div v-for="(item, index) in galleryItems" :key="index" ref="thumbItems" class="shop-gallery-thumb" :class="{ active: currentIndex === index }" @click="goTo(index)" > <img :src="item.thumb || item.cover" alt="" /> <span class="video-icon" v-if="item.type === 'video'"></span> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </teleport> window.sendDetailPageViewStep = 0 window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => { if (window.sendDetailPageViewStep < 99) { const postId = $('#hid\_postId').val() window.hotEventSend && window.hotEventSend(\`詳情頁數據採集分析-住宅\_${postId}\_${sendDetailPageViewStep}\`) } }) seajs.use("envDetector"); seajs.use("houseDetail"); //新版ga統計analytics.js var nowDate = new Date().toLocaleDateString(); if (Object.prototype.toString.call(window.Promise.resolve()) !== '\[object Promise\]' && (!localStorage.getItem('outdatedBrowser') || nowDate !== localStorage.getItem('outdatedBrowser'))) { document.write('<link type="text/css" rel="stylesheet" href="//s.591.com.tw/build\\/lib\\/outdated\\/css\\/outdatedbrowser.min.css">') $.getScript( "//s.591.com.tw/build\\/lib\\/outdated\\/js\\/outdatedbrowser.js", function(){ outdatedBrowser( { bgColor: '#fdb302', color: '#ffffff', lowerThan: 'Edge', languagePath: '//s.591.com.tw/build\\/lib\\/outdated\\/lang\\/zh-tw.html' } ) hotEventSend && hotEventSend('低版本瀏覽器升級提醒\_曝光') // 設置localStorage，如果關閉掉一次之後當天就不再提示 $(document).on('click','#btnCloseUpdateBrowser',function() { localStorage.setItem('outdatedBrowser', nowDate) }) }) }
